epics.title: Authentication
epics.summary: Implement multi-factor authentication for secure access.
epics.description: Develop a secure multi-factor authentication system using OTP and biometric verification for the banking portal. Ensure that the system is robust and thwart common security threats. Use React for the frontend interfaces and FastAPI for the backend authentication processes.
